title: lastrea obtusiloba
intro: Lastrea obtusiloba, also known as the Chinese fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and acting as an antioxidant. Lastrea obtusiloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, making it a versatile and widely used plant in traditional medicine.
